code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut sum = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut done = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)

  while i < n
    if not done
      let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
      let b = match b_opt
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end

      let is_part = (b >= 48 and b <= 57) or b == 45 or b == 43
      if is_part
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      else
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          let v_opt = string.parse_int(token)
          match v_opt
          when Some(v)
            if v < 0
              done = true
            else
              sum = sum + v
            end
          when None
            done = true
          end
          token = ""
        end
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if not done
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      let v_opt = string.parse_int(token)
      match v_opt
      when Some(v)
        if v >= 0
          sum = sum + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end

  println("partial=#{sum}")
end
